请输入引导用户录入全局变量的标题语: Please enter title prompting user to enter global variables

未指定是，默认在应用测不可见。指定后，将取按类型和指定视图的集合发布。: If not specified, invisible in app by default. If specified, published based on type and specified views.
sdk freemarker 模版目录不存在: The SDK Freemarker template directory does not exist

未查询到工具信息，请刷新页面重试: No tool info found, please refresh and try again

请按照主模型名称 / 编码搜索，搜索后从下拉框中选择主模型，并通过【配置元数据】: Search by main model name/code, select from dropdown, set metadata semantics via [Config Metadata]

回复上限必须大于0: Reply limit must be greater than 0

智能体发布中，请稍后再试: Agent is being published, please try again later
此提示词应用于模型微调的角色定义，建议录入具体业务场景相关的提示词，比如订单的自: This prompt is used for role definition in model fine-tuning. It is recommended to enter prompts related to specific business scenarios, such as "Automatic Order Review Expert". Please enter relevant descriptions in the preset pane, and you can use @ to call up tools for input
输入MCP地址，支持 SSE/Streamable HTTP: Enter MCP Address, supports SSE/Streamable HTTP

记忆轮数必须大于等于0: Memory rounds must be greater than or equal to 0
1、如未上传，展示默认图标: 1. If not uploaded, display the default icon
3、图标大小不超过5M: 3. The icon size does not exceed 5M
任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述任务描述: Task description task description task description task description task description task description task description task description task description task description task description task description
关联模型：模型名称-模型编码: Associated Model: Model Name - Model Code
数据自动化采集任务名称X: Data Automation Collection Task Name X
暂无协同智能体，请点击: No collaborative agents available, please click
多个序列请用 | 隔开，例如：aaa | stop: Please separate multiple sequences with |, for example: aaa | stop
范围：0~100。可以配置模型支持的记忆轮数，如果模型的超出上下文，系统会自动截: Range: 0~100. You can configure the number of memory rounds supported by the model. If the model exceeds the context, the system automatically truncates the model to ensure that the model does not exceed the context as much as possible. Therefore, despite the configuration of 30 rounds of dialogue, the actual operation will not necessarily reach 30 rounds.
范围：0~10。值越大，代表模型回答越发散；值越小，代表回答越严谨。: Range: 0~10. The larger the value, the more divergent the model's answer is; The smaller the value, the more rigorous the answer.
范围：0~1。温度采样的替代方法，称为 Nucleus 采样，该模型考虑了具有: Range: 0~1. An alternative method for temperature sampling, called Nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of tokens with a TOP_P probability mass. 0.1 means only considering tokens that contain the highest probability mass. The default is 1.
暂无工具，请点击: No tools available at the moment, please click
具备推理和场景规划功能的智能助手，适用于多场景复杂任务完成的场景: Intelligent assistant with reasoning and scenario planning functions, suitable for scenarios where complex tasks are completed in multiple scenarios
具备推理和执行拥有特定工具执行力的智能助手，适用于细粒度对话场景的业务场景: An intelligent assistant with reasoning and the ability to execute using specific tools, suitable for business scenarios in fine-grained dialogue contexts.
输入字段编码或字段名称搜索: Enter field code or field name to search
请输入编辑块内容为空时的提示文案: Please enter the prompt text when the edit block is empty
输入应用名称搜索: Enter the application name to search
确定要删除${item.name}所有历史版本及聊天记录?确认后所有该智能体的引: Are you sure you want to delete all historical versions and chat records of ${item.name}? Once confirmed, all references to this AI agent will also become invalid.
确定要删除该工作室吗?: Are you sure you want to delete this studio?
使用【新增任务】按钮添加你的第一个采集任务吧: Use the [Add Task] button to add your first collection task.
当前无数据采集任务: No data collection tasks currently available
使用「新增任务」按钮添加你的第一个微调任务吧: Use the 'Add Task' button to add your first fine-tuning task
当前无模型微调任务: There are currently no model fine-tuning tasks
确认删除${item.name}? 确认删除后工具的引用也将同步失效: Confirm to delete ${item.name}? Confirm that references to tools will be invalidated synchronously after deletion
请先填写表单内容再尝试发送: Please fill in the form before trying to send
请等待响应完成: Please wait for the response to complete
为避免同业务场景元数据重复声明，Aino将通过主模型+行为确定唯一性: To avoid duplicate metadata declarations in the same scenario, Aino ensures uniqueness via Main Model + Behavior.
决定了低秩矩阵的维度，影响模型的性能和训练时间。对于小型数据集或简单任务，秩可以: Determines the dimension of the low-rank matrix, affecting model performance and training time. For small datasets or simple tasks, rank can be set to 1 or 2; for more complex tasks, rank may need to be 4, 8, or higher. Generally, r ranges from 1 to 128. For most tasks, a smaller r value (like 4, 8, or 16) is sufficient.
在文本生成或处理任务中，max tokens通常指的是模型在一次处理中能够生成或: In text generation or processing tasks, max tokens usually refers to the maximum number of tokens the model can generate or accept in one processing. Adjust according to specific tasks and available resources. For example, when processing long documents, a larger max tokens value may be needed. When resources are limited, reduce max tokens to balance performance and consumption. Range: (0, 32768]
定义当前智能体发布的渠道: Define publish channels for current agent
小批量梯度下降中的关键概念，它指每次训练时使用的样本数量。批量大小的选择影响了计: Key concept in mini-batch gradient descent, referring to sample count per training. Batch size affects efficiency and stability. Too large or small affects training effect.
微调之后的模型名称，全局唯一，QWEN为设置模型后缀: Fine-tuned model name, globally unique. QWEN is used to set model suffix.
控制训练过程中随机丢弃低秩矩阵中元素的比例，防止过拟合。常用值范围在0到1之间，: Controls dropout ratio in low-rank matrix during training to prevent overfitting. Usually 0 to 1, depending on model and data size. 0.2-0.3 is common. Lower (0.1) for small models, higher (0.4-0.5) for large networks. Range: [0, 1.0)
未设置角色时，所有用户可访问；设置角色后，仅限绑定角色的用户访问。: Accessible by all if no role set; otherwise, only by users with bound roles.
标量参数，用于控制每次参数更新的步长。合理设置学习率是训练高效进行的关键，过大的: Scalar parameter for step size in parameter updates. Proper learning rate is key to efficient training. Too large may cause oscillation, too small prolongs training. Range: (0, 0.1]
模型元数据、自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于大幅度提升LLM输出高质量内容: Model metadata, automation behavior metadata. Accurate metadata significantly improves LLM output quality.
模型在完整数据集上进行一次迭代的次数，即模型将数据集“轮”过一次。在神经网络训练: Number of iterations the model passes through the full dataset. More than one epoch is necessary for neural network training. Increases fitting ability. Range: [1, 10]
每次对话开始前，发送一个初始内容。支持标准 Markdown 语法，可使用的额外:
Send an initial message before each dialogue starts. Supports standard Markdown syntax. Available extra tags:
[Shortcut Key]: Users can click to send this question directly
用于调整低秩矩阵的影响力，确保训练稳定性。常见值在16-32，较大的alpha值: Used to adjust low-rank matrix influence for training stability. Common values 16-32. Larger alpha increases model expression but may increase training difficulty. Depends on rank and task complexity.
直接录入的内容仅在提示词模板编辑器中可编辑，编辑块的内容可在提示词输入框中编辑: Directly entered content is only editable in prompt template editor; block content can be edited in prompt input box.
精准的描述有助于降低使用成本，最大不超过512字符: A precise description helps reduce usage cost, max 512 characters
良好的名称命名有助于降低管理成本: Good naming helps reduce management cost

从左侧选择一个任务以查看详情: Select a task from the left to view details
不能小于0.01最小值: Cannot be less than the minimum value of 0.01
模型元数据、自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于数据集的效果显著提升: Model metadata, automated behavior metadata; accurate metadata helps significantly improve dataset performance
准确的元数据描述将有助于数据集的效果显著提升: Accurate metadata descriptions will help significantly improve dataset performance
请再次输入提示词内容: Please enter the prompt content again
查看模型元数据、自动化行为元数据，准确的元数据有助于数据集的效果显著提升: View model metadata and automated behavior metadata; accurate metadata helps significantly improve dataset performance

每次对话开始前，发送一个初始内容。支持标准 Markdown 语法，可使用的额外: Send initial content before each conversation starts. Supports standard Markdown syntax and additional tags [Shortcut Keys]: Users can click to send the question directly
按下 Cmd + Enter 换行，Option + ↑/↓ 切换历史消息: Press Cmd + Enter to start a new line, Option + ↑/↓ to switch history messages
多个序列请用|隔开，例如：aaa | stop: Separate multiple sequences with |, e.g., aaa | stop
请先选择左侧的工具集: Please select the toolset on the left first
请输入内容后再尝试发送: Please enter content before trying to send
未设置任何角色时，所有用户可访问；设置后，仅限绑定下方角色的用户: When no roles are set, it is accessible to all users; after setting, it is limited to users bound to the roles below
未指定时，默认在应用侧不可见。指定后，将取按类型和指定视图的集合发布: When not specified, it is invisible on the application side by default. After specification, it will be published according to the collection of type and specified views
当前应用所有表格: All tables in the current application
当前应用所有表单: All forms in the current application
当前应用所有详情页: All detail pages in the current application
当前应用所有画廊: All galleries in the current application
除 Aino 对话框外，发布至各类视图中的样例: Samples published to various views, excluding the Aino dialog
该工具无需输入参数: This tool requires no input parameters
运行后结果将显示在此处: The result after running will be displayed here
执行失败：GraphQL error：校验失败，数据错误: Execution failed: GraphQL error: Validation failed, data error
保存失败：请至少添加一个工具或函数: Save failed: Please add at least one tool or function
使用「新增元数据」添加第一条元数据: Use "Add Metadata" to add the first metadata
从左侧选择一个元数据以查看详情: Select a metadata from the left to view details
请输入人设与回复逻辑（提示词）: Please enter character setting and reply logic (prompt)
未设置任何角色时，所有用户可访问；设置后，仅限绑定下方角色的用户访问。: When no roles are set, all users can access; when set, only users bound to the following roles can access.
未指定时，默认在应用侧不可见。指定后，将取按类型和指定视图的集合发布。: When not specified, it is invisible on the application side by default. Once specified, the collection will be published according to the type and the specified views.
